summary.zh: Kimi K3 新增中档与高档思考选项，中文界面将最高档标为 Max；并修复导致 Windows 发版打包卡住的独立服务端校验。
summary.en: Kimi K3 now offers medium and high thinking tiers, Chinese UI labels the top tier as Max, and Windows release packaging no longer stalls on standalone server verification.

title.zh: Kimi K3 支持中档与高档思考
title.en: Kimi K3 medium and high thinking tiers

summary.zh: Kimi K3 提供中档与高档思考级别，并去掉不可用的关闭档。
summary.en: Kimi K3 exposes medium and high thinking levels and drops the unusable off tier.

sources.title: feat(models): offer medium and high thinking levels for Kimi K3
fix(models): drop the off thinking level from Kimi K3

title.zh: 最高思考档中文显示为 Max
title.en: Chinese UI labels top thinking tier as Max

summary.zh: 中文界面将最高思考档位显示为 Max。
summary.en: Chinese locales label the highest thinking tier as Max.

sources.title: fix(i18n): label the max thinking tier as Max in Chinese locales

title.zh: 修复 Windows 独立服务端发版校验

summary.zh: 发版校验改为按真实沙箱契约准备临时目录与用户目录，Windows 安装包发布流水线可以继续完成。
summary.en: Release verification now prepares temp and profile dirs under the real sandbox writable contract, so Windows installer publishing can finish.

sources.title: fix(release): verify Windows standalone sandbox with a native cmd.exe child
